title: X-tra Smoky Peruvian Ceviche Tiradito
description: A twist on traditional Peruvian ceviche, this recipe incorporates caraway seed and dashi-extract for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Cut the Sea Bass Fillets into thin slices.
Mix together Caraway Seeds and Dashi Extract in a small bowl.
In a large bowl, combine the Sea Bass slices, Lime Juice, Cilantro, Aji Amarillo Pepper, Red Onion, Salt, and Black Pepper.
Add the Caraway-Dashi mixture to the bowl and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, stir in some chopped fresh Cilantro, if desired.
Serve the Tiradito cold, garnished with additional Cilantro and Caraway Seeds if desired.
Traditionally, this dish is served with crispy corn kernels called 'choclo' or toasted corn nuts, if desired.
